tagline: Agentic AI Research Platform for Scientists and PhD Researchers

challenge.headline: Advanced AI was locked behind engineering expertise
challenge.description: Scientists who needed AI agents to process massive datasets or run complex analysis workflows faced steep technical barriers without dedicated engineering support. Sending sensitive research data to commercial AI platforms also violated institutional data policies.

result.headline: AI research democratized at Carnegie Mellon
result.quote: DARE has transformed AI-powered research from an engineering challenge into an accessible tool for scientific discovery. Deployed at Carnegie Mellon University, it now accelerates AI-powered research across multiple disciplines.
